---
title: "QED Labs"
---

This site is organized into three top-level sections:

- [Notes](notes/index.qmd) for method overviews and source-based study notes
- [Reports](reports/index.qmd) for longer evaluator-facing report drafts
- [Labs](labs/index.qmd) for worksheet-style design exercises

## Current Emphasis

The strongest current coverage is in matching and weighting, where the site now combines:

- a notes section with both overview and source-specific reading notes
- a report draft that can be expanded into a full matching writeup
- a migrated lab set built from the earlier `matching-trg` material

Synthetic control now has:

- a notes section
- a report skeleton draft
- two design-lab skeletons for future build-out

## Working Rule

Across all three sections, the standard is the same: define the design first, document diagnostics clearly, and separate what the design supports from what the analyst would like it to say.
